description:
Perform a competitive SEO benchmark by crawling a curated list of URLs from three different domains using List Mode. 

Domain 1 (E-commerce):
- https://books.toscrape.com/
- https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/mystery_3/index.html
- https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/travel_2/index.html
- https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/nonfiction_13/index.html
- https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/the-black-maria_991/index.html

Domain 2 (Content):
- https://quotes.toscrape.com/
- https://quotes.toscrape.com/page/2/
- https://quotes.toscrape.com/tag/love/
- https://quotes.toscrape.com/tag/inspirational/
- https://quotes.toscrape.com/author/Albert-Einstein/

Domain 3 (Technical):
- https://crawler-test.com/
- https://crawler-test.com/titles/long_title
- https://crawler-test.com/descriptions/missing_description
- https://crawler-test.com/headers/h1
- https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links

Export the crawl data to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/competitive_benchmark.csv. Write a comparison report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/competitive_report.txt that evaluates the three domains based on average title length, meta description availability, and response time. The report must include at least 3 actionable recommendations.
